creator: jlduran@FreeBSD.org
text:
Would it be possible to install devel/py-pytest in order for ci.freebsd.org to support atf_python-based tests?

Tests that use the framework are currently being skipped, for example:
https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-main-aarch64-test/1096/testReport/sbin.ping.test_ping/py/__test_cases_list_pytest_binary_not_found__/

On that same vein, net/scapy is another tool that is currently heavily used for networking tests.

Thank you!
